channel.title: Bolaji's Blog
channel.description: Thoughts, tutorials, and insights on software engineering, APIs, and building scalable systems.

item.title: I've Been Building Since I Had No Laptop
item.description: My journey into programming, starting with shared systems, mobile coding setups, and finding a way to build things out of pure curiosity.

item.title: ProofDeck API Integration Guide
item.description: A step-by-step developer tutorial on how to issue and verify digital credentials programmatically using the ProofDeck API endpoints.
